questions.question: In Multiple Ovulation Embryo Transfer (MOET) technology, which hormone is administered to the cow to induce follicular maturation and super-ovulation?
Which of the following processes requires the administration of Follicle Stimulating Hormone (FSH) to a superior female?
Which hormone is responsible for the reabsorption of water in DCT and collecting duct? (Exam form 690)
questions.solution: By definition, ADH (Vasopressin) performs this role.

questions.question: Which was the first human hormone produced by recombinant DNA technology?
In human insulin produced via recombinant DNA, what critical post-translational modification is missing compared to the natural pancreas process?

options.A: The removal of the C-peptide (It is synthesized directly as A and B chains)
options.C: The glycosylation of the A chain
options.D: The folding of the B chain

Which of the following endocrine glands is responsible for the production of the hormone oxytocin?
Which of the following endocrine glands is responsible for the production of the hormone prolactin?
What is the primary function of the hormone gastrin in the human body?

options.A: To regulate the production of stomach acid
options.B: To regulate the production of digestive enzymes
options.C: To regulate the movement of food through the digestive system
options.D: To regulate the absorption of nutrients

questions.question: Myelin sheath in CNS is formed by: (Exam form 911)
questions.solution: By definition, Oligodendrocytes performs this role.
